image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic photo of a young Latina woman in her early-mid 20s sitting on the warm limestone edge of a turquoise infinity pool at a luxury tropical resort during midday. She has long wavy auburn-red hair with copper sun-kissed highlights falling past her shoulders, slightly damp and textured from the humid tropical air with a few strands clinging to her neck. Athletic-toned hourglass figure with warm caramel skin showing natural texture, real pores, and a light golden tan with subtle tan lines visible on her shoulders. She wears a simple white triangle bikini top with thin gold chain connector straps and high-waisted denim cutoff shorts that are unbuttoned at the top with frayed edges sitting on her hips. A thin gold anklet catches the light on her right ankle and small gold stud earrings glint in the sun. She sits with her lower legs dangling into the crystal clear turquoise water creating gentle ripples around her calves. Both hands press flat against the sun-warmed stone behind her with arms straight supporting her weight as she leans back with shoulders open and chest lifted toward the sun. She looks directly at the camera with a relaxed unbothered expression, one corner of her mouth turned up in a subtle knowing smirk, eyes squinting slightly against the bright overhead sun with natural crow's feet creases. Her head tilts back just slightly catching the overhead light on her collarbones and jawline casting a defined shadow under her chin. Behind her the infinity pool edge drops off into a panoramic deep blue ocean view with the water meeting a hazy pale sky at the horizon line. Lush tropical greenery and tall coconut palms frame both sides of the pool deck. A folded striped beach towel and an oversized natural straw sun hat sit on the warm stone beside her right hip. Bright overhead midday tropical sun creates strong defined shadows beneath her thighs and across the pool deck with brilliant light reflections dancing off the water surface and casting shimmering aquatic caustic patterns across her bare stomach and the stone beneath her. Turquoise blue, warm caramel, crisp white, faded denim blue, tropical green color palette. Luxury resort poolside aesthetic. Third-person shot from slightly above eye level, full body framing with pool and ocean visible, centered vertical composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic front camera selfie of a young woman in her early-mid 20s with warm olive skin and long straight jet-black hair parted in the middle falling sleekly past her collarbone. Athletic-toned hourglass figure with natural skin texture and visible pores. She wears a cropped black leather jacket with silver zipper details over a simple white scoop-neck bodysuit that hugs her torso. Small silver hoop earrings and a thin silver chain necklace with a tiny crescent moon pendant catch the light. She holds her phone up with her right hand for a front camera selfie at a slightly low angle below her chin, left hand casually tucked into the jacket pocket with her thumb hooked over the edge. She leans slightly against a raw concrete pillar in an urban parking garage with her right shoulder blade pressed against the rough surface and her body angled naturally. Her expression is cool and unbothered, a subtle confident smirk with half-lidded relaxed eyes and her chin tilted slightly up creating a natural down-the-nose gaze at the camera. The parking garage has raw grey concrete walls and structural pillars with visible construction texture, a single strip of harsh fluorescent overhead light visible in the ceiling behind her casting a cool clinical glow, and the warm rich orange glow of a setting sun visible through the wide garage opening behind and to her right painting dramatic warm rim light along her right shoulder and the edge of her hair. The contrast between cold blue-white fluorescent light from above and warm amber sunset backlight from behind creates a striking cinematic dual-tone lighting effect across her face with the warm side glowing amber and the shadow side tinted cool blue. Cool concrete gray, warm sunset orange, matte black leather, brushed silver metallic, warm skin tones color palette. Urban cinematic selfie aesthetic. Front camera shot from slightly below eye level, medium shot from waist up, centered vertical composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic fashion editorial photo of a young Black woman in her early-mid 20s posing in a clean professional photography studio. She has long dark brown hair styled in sleek straight layers with a deep side part sweeping across her forehead, the hair falling smoothly past her shoulders with a subtle glossy sheen catching the studio lights. Athletic-toned hourglass figure with rich deep brown skin showing natural texture and real pores with a healthy natural sheen. She wears a structured deep navy blue satin blazer with sharp angular shoulders and a plunging V-neckline worn without a shirt underneath, the lapels framing her sternum and revealing the elegant lines of her collarbones, paired with high-waisted tailored ivory wide-leg trousers that drape elegantly toward the floor with a single front crease. Chunky gold geometric drop earrings hang from her ears catching the light, and multiple thin gold bangles are stacked on her left wrist. She stands in a strong contrapposto pose with her left hip pushed out prominently and right leg stepped slightly forward, creating a powerful angular silhouette. Her right hand rests inside the blazer pocket with just the thumb and wrist visible, left arm bent at the elbow with fingertips lightly touching the edge of her jawline as if in quiet thought. She looks directly into the camera lens with an intense neutral expression, lips closed and perfectly relaxed, strong unwavering eye contact that commands attention, chin elevated slightly with natural authority. The studio features a seamless warm off-white backdrop paper creating a clean minimal environment with no visible wrinkles or seams and a smooth gradient shadow falling softly behind her. Professional studio lighting with a large octabox key light positioned from the upper right creating soft even illumination with gentle defined shadows along the left side of her face and body, a subtle fill light from the left reducing harsh contrast while preserving dimension, and a thin rim light from directly behind adding a bright outline along her right shoulder and the edge of her hair separating her cleanly from the backdrop. Deep navy, warm ivory, rich burnished gold, deep brown skin tones, warm off-white color palette. High fashion editorial aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, full body framing with slight headroom above and floor visible below, centered vertical composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic candid street style photo of a young biracial woman in her early-mid 20s walking down a sun-drenched urban sidewalk in a trendy neighborhood. She has long dark brown hair with natural loose waves and honey-toned highlights scattered through the lengths, the hair falling messily past her shoulders with a few windswept strands blowing across her face from a light breeze. Athletic-toned hourglass figure with light golden-brown skin showing natural texture and a warm sun-kissed glow with a subtle flush across her cheeks from the heat. She wears a vintage oversized faded denim jacket with the sleeves rolled up to her elbows showing her forearms over a fitted black ribbed crop top that reveals a strip of her toned midriff, paired with low-rise olive green cargo pants with silver snap hardware on the pockets and chunky white platform sneakers. Small gold hoop earrings glint as they swing, round tortoiseshell sunglasses are pushed up on top of her head, and a small black leather crossbody bag with a silver chain strap hangs at her hip. She walks mid-stride with her right foot forward and left foot just lifting off the concrete creating a slight natural motion energy in the frame. Her right hand grips the crossbody bag strap across her chest with relaxed fingers, left hand swinging naturally at her side holding an iced matcha latte in a clear plastic cup with condensation dripping down the sides. She glances to her right toward the camera with a candid half-smile caught naturally mid-expression as if someone just caught her attention, bright eyes open and naturally squinted from the warm afternoon sunlight. The street behind her shows warm-toned brick building facades with black iron fire escapes, a vintage neon coffee shop sign glowing faintly in daylight, terracotta pots with trailing ivy plants outside storefronts, and a single blurred pedestrian walking in the opposite direction adding urban life. Late afternoon golden hour sunlight comes from behind and to the left creating a warm luminous backlit halo effect wrapping around her hair and outlining the edges of her denim jacket, with long dramatic shadows stretching forward on the grey concrete sidewalk ahead of her and a warm amber wash softening the entire scene. Faded denim blue, olive green, warm amber gold, matte black, light golden-brown skin tones color palette. Candid urban street style aesthetic. Third-person shot from slightly ahead and to the left capturing her walking toward camera, three-quarter body framing with street environment visible, slight dutch angle adding dynamic energy. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.
